hypothesis:
## Novel Hypothesis

Incorporating a dynamic attention-weighted reconstruction loss—where λ varies as a learned function of the predicted target compound's concentration and spectral overlap with co-eluting components—will enable the model to autonomously prioritize disentanglement of low-concentration analytes in highly imbalanced mixtures, thereby improving Top-1 accuracy for minority components (≤10% concentration) by at least 15 percentage points compared to the fixed λ = 50 alignment strategy.
